50: 〉 All of the other people brought to 
the Diamond Realm should now be with 
En no Ozuno.
[->]〉 Find En no Ozuno and meet up with
the other messiahs.
[END]
100: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]It would appear all are now gathered.
[->]Only one remains−−the one whose soul 
is in Stephen's care.
[->]Stephen should be waiting for you.
I have opened the east door. Go to him.
[->]Be prepared for anything.
[END]
101: (Flynn) [7a 187]You've no doubt noticed already, 
but the enemies here are strong... 
Be careful.
[END]
102: (Demi−fiend) [7a 6]Well, considering you came to get us, 
you can probably make it through, 
right?
[END]
103: (Aleph) [7a 4]I will pray for your safety and
success. Let us go.
[END]
104: 〉 You leave the room.
[END]
105: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]Hm? What are you doing? You haven't 
found the others, yet.
[->]Go and find the others.
[END]
106: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]O−ho, it seems you've met one of the 
others. I heard what happened 
from him.
[->]Now, go find the other two.
[END]
107: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]Hm, it would appear things are 
proceeding well... Only one other
remains to be found.
[->]Now, go find him. We shall await your
return.
[END]
108: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]Stephen awaits you. Head through the
east door.
[->]Exercise caution.
[END]
